theme_and_archetype.rationale: The app demands a 'Liquid Glass' aesthetic in strict Black & White. To maintain premium contrast without color, we rely on depth (opacity layers), frosted glassmorphism (heavy blur + low opacity white), and stark typographic contrast.

background.texture: Add subtle grain/noise via CSS to prevent banding and increase tactile feel.

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-[480px] mx-auto min-h-screen relative overflow-hidden bg-[#050505]

buttons.primary: h-14 w-full rounded-full bg-white text-black font-semibold text-base flex items-center justify-center transition-transform active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.fab: fixed bottom-24 right-6 h-16 w-16 rounded-full bg-white text-black shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,255,255,0.3)] flex items-center justify-center z-50

inputs.default: h-14 w-full bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 rounded-2xl px-5 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:outline-none focus:border-white/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/50 transition-all text-base
inputs.calculator: h-20 w-full bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-2xl px-6 text-2xl font-mono text-white text-center focus:border-white/40 placeholder:text-white/20 transition-all

cards.stat: bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-6 flex flex-col justify-between aspect-square relative overflow-hidden before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-gradient-to-br before:from-white/5 before:to-transparent before:pointer-events-none
cards.order: bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/5 rounded-3xl p-5 mb-4 active:bg-white/[0.05] transition-colors

navigation.bottom_dock: fixed bottom-0 inset-x-0 h-20 bg-[#050505]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-white/10 flex justify-around items-center px-6 pb-safe z-40 max-w-[480px] mx-auto
navigation.header_glass: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full bg-[#050505]/70 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/5 pt-safe h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6

chat.bubble_received: self-start bg-white/[0.06] backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tl-none py-3 px-4 max-w-[80%]
chat.bubble_sent: self-end bg-white text-black rounded-2xl rounded-tr-none py-3 px-4 max-w-[80%]
chat.input_area: sticky bottom-0 w-full bg-[#050505]/90 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-white/10 p-4 pt-4 pb-safe flex gap-3 items-end

interactive_states.hover_active: Always explicitly define hover/active. Active (mobile) should use scale-[0.98] and slight brightness increase.
interactive_states.focus: Inputs must have focus:border-white/50 and text-white to remain accessible against dark bg.
interactive_states.data_testid: Apply data-testid to every interactive element (e.g., 'login-submit-button', 'calc-width-input', 'order-card-123').

motion_and_effects.page_load: Staggered fade-up for list items (Framer Motion: initial opacity 0, y 10).
motion_and_effects.glass_reflection: Use a subtle inset shadow on heavy glass cards to simulate edge thickness: shadow-[inset_0_1px_1px_rgba(255,255,255,0.15)]

images.description: Abstract black and white flowing silk fabric mimicking liquid glass, ultra premium, deep black background.
images.usage: Use as full-screen absolute background on the Login screen, behind a heavy glass card.

images.description: Minimalist premium living room window with elegant sheer curtains, completely black and white photography.
images.usage: Use with heavy opacity overlay (opacity-20) behind empty state messages in Orders or Chat.

images.description: Abstract 3d render of a smooth liquid glass sphere, pure black and white.
images.usage: Use as the app icon / logo in the header and login screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a 'mobile-app' experience built with web technologies (React/Tailwind). Constrain the main wrapper to max-w-[480px] mx-auto min-h-screen to simulate a mobile viewport on desktop.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF) for large backgrounds/text. Use #050505 for bg and text-white/90 for main text.
Ensure the 'Liquid Glass' aesthetic is achieved through stacking `backdrop-blur` utilities and very low opacity white backgrounds (e.g. bg-white/[0.04]).
Strictly adhere to the Black & White palette. Use typography (size/weight) and opacity for hierarchy, not color.
For the Calculator, emphasize the numbers using the 'JetBrains Mono' font, large inputs, and a prominent 'Total Sq.m' glass display.
All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
Do not use Shadcn default colored components. Override them to match the B&W Liquid Glass theme.
